title: BetterRaid
description: A mod that optimizes the plundering raid
body:
Information is provided in the upper left corner.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fd52410e0bb17ad690add13ddff1489214b88d4.png)

and will tell you whats raiders will spawn this wave.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e284601529a03210ec1fbfee18ba20a3ec6ca1f.png)

Sometimes raiders may generate underground and cause you to be unable to find them, resulting in getting stuck.

so this mod support:When the current wave starts, there will be a countdown,When the countdown ends, the next wave will automatically start. The default time is three minutes.

you can disable this in config.

now you dont need to kill the raider that not spawned by raid and Join midway to finish current wave.
